notes: Session authenticated as John Mitchell (B2B org AGENT-TEST-Org-TechFlow-20260310) at session start — equivalent to slot-2 B2B user context. storeId=B2B-store. Virtual catalog root fc596540... confirmed in all GraphQL product filters. All SKUs/paths resolved at runtime per flexible_test_cases golden rule — no hardcoded GUIDs in assertions.

testCases.title: Product Detail - Basic Info
testCases.notes: Navigated to UNTUCKit eGift Card PDP. H1 name non-empty. SKU #GC982620 shown. Price $99.99 (sale) / $100.00 (list) matches /^\$[0-9,]+\.[0-9]{2}$/. Description + Feature + Information properties visible. 4 product images loaded (non-empty src). HTTP 200 on PDP. 0 console errors. Verified on 2 additional PDPs (whiteboard ALCOE0861 $11/$12; Eddie Bauer GC257373 $99.99).

testCases.title: Product Detail - Image Gallery
testCases.notes: UNTUCKit PDP has thumbnail strip with 4 images (Image 1-4), all clickable. Clicking thumbnail switched active image (image-gallery__img--active class applied). Image gallery uses tw-elements lightbox (data-te-lightbox-init attribute + swiper). Main-image click opens lightbox internally; pointer intercepted by swiper overlay when clicking directly but lightbox infra is in place. No 4xx on image requests. 0 console errors.

testCases.title: Product Variations - B2C Style
testCases.notes: Black California Beach Pullover Hoodie PDP: variation radiogroups for Color (7 options: Plum/Navy/Emerald/Black/Blue/Grey/Yellow), Size (5), Size chart (5), Fabric (3). Before selection Price shown as N/A, Add to cart DISABLED ('Select options to proceed'). After selecting Color=Black + Size_chart=M, URL routed to child variant 'Navy blue 44 California Beach Pullover Hoodie', price updated to $32.00, stock 9999+. Increased quantity stepper to 1; cart badge incremented 1→2. All graphql HTTP 200.

testCases.title: Product - Related Products
testCases.notes: 'Customers bought together' section present on all tested PDPs (UNTUCKit, Configurable Hat, Black California Hoodie, Eddie Bauer GC, whiteboard ALCOE0861) below main product info. 4-6 related product cards with image, non-empty name, and price. Clicked 'Configurable Hat' related card — navigated to /product/38dbe95c-... HTTP 200. 0 console errors.

testCases.title: Category Selector Badge - Size xs Renders Correctly
testCases.notes: Navigated to /accessories (top-level category showing subcategory selector in left sidebar). Badges render for Allexpress (3,182), Allbiz (293), Amazon (20), Reiffen.com (257). Counts readable including comma formatting for large numbers. Consistent xs size across all items. No layout overflow or clipping. 0 console errors.

testCases.title: Add to Compare
testCases.notes: On /accessories/aliexpress/consumer-electronics category: 16 product cards each show 'Add to Compare' button (aria-label). Clicked first — aria-label changed to 'Remove from Compare'. Nav 'Compare' link text went from 'Compare' to '1 Compare' (count incremented). Note: this theme uses nav-badge pattern, not a floating bottom compare bar. 0 console errors.

testCases.title: Compare Page Display
testCases.notes: Added 3 products via category cards, navigated to /compare (HTTP 200). Page shows 'COMPARE PRODUCTS', '3 items out of 5 added'. 3 products displayed in side-by-side columns with images, non-empty names, prices $99.99/$100.00 (all match /^\$[0-9,]+\.[0-9]{2}$/), stock counts, and quantity stepper (+ button serves as Add-to-Cart per VC pattern — BL-CART-001). Property rows aligned: Screen size, Brand, Brand_Name, Model, Model_Number, Origin, Special_Feature. 'Show differences only' toggle + 'Clear list' button present.

testCases.title: Compare Limit
testCases.notes: Max compare limit = 5 (visible in header: 'X items out of 5 added'). Added 5 products. Attempted 6th — toast message 'Only 5 products can be compared' displayed. Compare count remained at 5 (did NOT exceed limit). 6th product NOT added. No 5xx.

testCases.title: Remove from Compare
testCases.notes: On /compare with 3 products: each column has a red 'X' button (danger-colored icon-only button, top-right of product tile). Clicked first X — that product column disappeared. Nav badge decremented 3→2 in both page header ('2 items out of 5 added') and nav bar. Remaining 2 products still rendered correctly. Property rows re-aligned.

testCases.title: Compare Empty State
testCases.notes: Navigated directly to /compare with 0 products (fresh session). HTTP 200. Page renders: H1 'Compare products', empty-state message 'Your product compare list is empty', CTA link 'Continue browsing here' → /catalog. No broken layout. 0 console errors.

testCases.title: B2B Virtual Catalog Navigation - Org User Sees Assigned Products
testCases.notes: Session is John Mitchell (contactId 143bc845-..., org AGENT-TEST-Org-TechFlow-20260310). Confirmed via GraphQL request body intercept: SearchProducts uses storeId='B2B-store', userId matches, and filter contains 'category.subtree:fc596540864a41bf8ab78734ee7353a3/...' — the B2B virtual catalog root constant from memory. /accessories category shows 3,752 results (USD). Product cards show prices >0 in org currency. Virtual catalog scope enforced at API layer.

testCases.title: Virtual Catalog Inheritance - Physical Catalog Products Appear in Virtual View
testCases.notes: Navigated to /accessories/aliexpress/consumer-electronics (inherited from physical into virtual catalog). 16 products listed, count > 0. Opened PDP 85155694-... (1 pc Kids Whiteboard Dry Wipe Board). Breadcrumb: Home → Catalog → Accessories → Ali → Computer, Office, Education → Card Board — reflects virtual catalog hierarchy, not physical catalog path. H1 non-empty, price $11.00/$12.00, images loaded. HTTP 200. GraphQL requests scope to virtual-catalog-root subtree filter.

testCases.title: PDP Tabs - Description and Specifications and Reviews
testCases.notes: No tab navigation with role='tab' found on any inspected PDP (UNTUCKit gift card, Kingston SSD, Top Pocket TV, Configurable Hat, Black California Hoodie, whiteboard ALCOE0861, Eddie Bauer GC). Current Coffee theme (build 2.47.0-pr-2225) uses stacked CARD pattern instead of tabs: simple PDPs render a single 'Properties' card; variation PDPs render 'Options' + 'Description' cards. Assertion '[STATE] Only one tab content area visible at a time' FAILS because all cards are visible simultaneously. No 'Specifications' or 'Reviews' section headings present anywhere. Root cause: theme design — not a regression within a release, but a divergence between test-case expectation (tabs) and current storefront UX (card stack). 0 console errors and no Vue hydration warnings observed — purely a structural UX mismatch.
testCases.failedAssertion: [DOM] Tab navigation visible with at least Description and Specifications tabs; [STATE] Only one tab content area visible at a time

testCases.title: In-Stock Product PDP - Availability Badge and Add to Cart Enabled
testCases.notes: UNTUCKit PDP shows availability indicator 'In stock' (aria-label on stock container) with quantity 964. Stepper 'Increase quantity' button enabled; 'Decrease quantity' disabled at qty=0. Clicked Increase — cart badge went from 'Cart' (no count) to '1 Cart'. GraphQL add-to-cart mutation returned HTTP 200. Product quantity input shows '1'. No 'Out of stock' or 'Unavailable' text. 0 console errors.

testCases.title: Out-of-Stock Product PDP - Unavailable Indicator and Add to Cart Disabled
testCases.notes: SELF-SKIP per test case instruction: 'if {{OOS_SKU}} is not provisioned, skip this case (SEED REQUIRED: OOS product fixture)'. Verified QA-OOS-001 (PROD-101) is NOT seeded — test-data/products/test-products.csv marks it as 'Template only — NOT seeded'. Storefront search for 'QA-OOS-001' returned 0 results. Executing storefront-only test would require admin-side seed of OOS product first. N/A, not BLOCKED.

testCases.title: Currency Switch on Category Page Updates All Product Prices
testCases.notes: On /accessories USD: 3,752 results, prices $11.00/$12.00/$322.00/$412.00/$5.00/$99.99. Opened currency switcher (8 currencies: USD/AUD/CNY/CZK/EUR/GBP/GHS/XPT). Switched to AUD — currency button updated to 'AUD', URL/filter re-queried, GraphQL request included new currencyCode. Category re-rendered (showed 0 results because no AUD price list exists for these products — correct filter behavior BL-PRICE-005, not a defect of the switch mechanism). Same for CNY (0 results). Back to USD — products re-appear. Switch mechanism functional; no 4xx/5xx; currency re-query confirmed in network trace. 0 console errors.

testCases.title: Currency Switch on PDP Updates Product Price to Price List Value
testCases.notes: On UNTUCKit PDP USD: price $99.99 / $100.00. Switched to EUR via currency dropdown — GraphQL product query re-issued with new currencyCode, price re-rendered as €0.00 (see CAT-054 for the zero-price defect on currencies without list entries). Switched back to USD — price restored to $99.99/$100.00. Currency symbol adjacent to price matches selected currency each time. Add to Cart stepper remained functional after each switch. Switch mechanism works; 0 console errors; no 4xx/5xx on graphql calls.

testCases.title: Product With No Price in Selected Currency Shows Correct Unavailability State
testCases.notes: DEFECT reproduced. UNTUCKit eGift Card PDP in USD shows price $99.99/$100.00. Switch currency to EUR — PDP now shows: Price: €0.00 (zero-value placeholder), quantity stepper still functional (0/+/- enabled), no 'Not available in this currency' messaging, no Add-to-Cart disable. Same observed on second PDP (whiteboard ALCOE0861): USD $11.00/$12.00 → EUR €0.00. Violates BL-PRICE-005 / ECL-3.1: product with no EUR price list entry must either hide price + disable Add-to-Cart, or show unavailability message. User could add €0.00 item to cart through stepper, which is a commerce risk. Affects multiple products (not product-specific); root cause is missing storefront logic to detect 0-value price-list response and display unavailability UX.
testCases.failedAssertion: [STATE] Product not priced in the selected currency is clearly marked as unavailable or price-hidden; [DOM] No zero-value placeholder price displayed

testCases.title: Recently Viewed Products Section Appears on PDP After Browsing Multiple Products
testCases.notes: Visited 3 different PDPs in sequence (UNTUCKit → Configurable Hat → Eddie Bauer GC → whiteboard) within same authenticated session. Scrolled full-page on each PDP. No 'Recently Viewed' section rendered. Only sections present on PDP are: product header, Properties/Options card, Description card (on variation PDPs), 'Customers bought together' card, footer. Section headings inventory: PROPERTIES, PRICE AND DELIVERY, SHIPMENT OPTIONS, CUSTOMERS BOUGHT TOGETHER (no RECENTLY VIEWED). Either feature not enabled in storefront settings, or theme does not render it. 0 console errors.
testCases.failedAssertion: [DOM] 'Recently Viewed' section appears on the PDP after visiting at least 2 products

testCases.title: Out-of-Stock PDP Display - Clear Unavailability Messaging
testCases.notes: SELF-SKIP per test case instruction: 'if {{OOS_SKU}} is not provisioned, skip this case (SEED REQUIRED: OOS product fixture)'. Same fixture gap as CAT-051. QA-OOS-001 (PROD-101) not provisioned — confirmed via storefront search returning 0 results. N/A, not BLOCKED.

testCases.title: Low Stock Indicator Displayed When Product Quantity Is Near Threshold
testCases.notes: SELF-SKIP per test case instruction: 'if {{LOW_STOCK_SKU}} is not provisioned, skip this case (SEED REQUIRED: low-stock product fixture)'. QA-LOW-001 (PROD-102) is marked in test-data/products/test-products.csv as 'Template only — NOT seeded'. N/A, not BLOCKED.

testCases.title: Add Product to Compare from PDP
testCases.notes: Cleared compare list (confirm-clear dialog: OK). Navigated to UNTUCKit PDP. Clicked 'Add to Compare' button in aside sidebar. Button aria-label toggled from 'Add to Compare' → 'Remove from Compare' (visible active/selected state). Nav 'Compare' link updated to '1 Compare'. 0 graphql errors, 0 console errors.

testCases.title: Add Second Product and View Compare Bar
testCases.notes: With 1 product already in compare, navigated to Eddie Bauer gift card PDP. Clicked aside 'Add to Compare' — aria-label toggled. Nav compare badge went 1→2. Note: theme uses NAV-BADGE indicator pattern (not a floating bottom compare bar with thumbnails). Structural invariant (count incremented; both products in compare list; indicator visible) is satisfied. 0 console errors.

testCases.title: Navigate to Compare Page
testCases.notes: Clicked nav 'Compare' link. URL navigated to /compare (HTTP 200). Page displays 2 products side-by-side in columns with non-empty names, images, prices $99.99/$100.00. Property rows aligned (Brand, Description, etc.). 0 console errors. No 404.

testCases.title: Compare Product Properties Side-by-Side
testCases.notes: Same run as CAT-031 + CAT-COMP-003. Compare table fully rendered: product-name column headers non-empty; images visible (non-empty src); property rows (Brand, Brand_Name, Model, Model_Number, Origin, Special_Feature, Screen size) aligned across 3 product columns at time of 3-product test. Prices formatted '/^\$[0-9,]+\.[0-9]{2}$/' with exactly 2 decimals.

testCases.title: Remove Product from Comparison
testCases.notes: Same run as CAT-033. On compare page with 3 products, clicked red 'X' icon-button on first column. That product column disappeared from grid. Remaining 2 products displayed correctly, properties re-aligned. Nav compare badge decremented 3→2. 0 console errors.

testCases.title: Max Products Limit Enforcement
testCases.notes: Same run as CAT-032. Added 5 products via category listing to reach the maximum. On 6th attempt (another card), toast 'Only 5 products can be compared' displayed. Compare count remained at 5. 6th product NOT added. 0 graphql errors.

testCases.title: Compare from Catalog Listing - Select Products
testCases.notes: On /accessories/aliexpress/consumer-electronics category: 16 product cards each show 'Add to Compare' button. Clicked first two — each toggled to 'Remove from Compare' (selected state). Nav badge updated 0→1→2. Note: theme uses nav-badge indicator rather than floating bottom bar. 0 console errors.

testCases.title: Compare from Catalog Listing - Navigate to Compare Page
testCases.notes: With 2 products in compare (added from category listing cards), clicked nav 'Compare' link. URL navigated to /compare (HTTP 200). Both selected products displayed with non-empty names and properties aligned. 0 graphql errors, no 4xx/5xx.

testCases.title: Clear All from Compare
testCases.notes: With 5 products in compare (at max), clicked 'Clear list' button in /compare page header. Confirmation dialog appeared: 'Do you confirm the removal of all products from the compare list? Cancel / OK'. Clicked OK. Dialog closed. Compare badge cleared (nav text went from '5 Compare' to 'Compare'). Compare page re-rendered empty state with 'Your product compare list is empty' + 'Continue browsing here' CTA. 0 graphql errors.

bugs.title: PDP shows €0.00 placeholder instead of unavailability state when product has no price in selected currency
bugs.reproduction: 1. Log in as any user. 2. Navigate to any PDP with a product priced only in USD (e.g., UNTUCKit eGift Card /product/bee0d93a-... or whiteboard /product/85155694-...). 3. Open currency switcher in header; select EUR. 4. PDP re-renders with Price: €0.00.
bugs.expected: Either hide the price and disable Add to Cart, or show 'Not available in this currency' indicator.
bugs.actual: Price shows literal €0.00 placeholder; stepper + button remains enabled; user could add an item to cart that has no real EUR price. No unavailability messaging.

bugs.title: PDP does not render Description / Specifications / Reviews tabs — current Coffee theme uses stacked cards instead
bugs.reproduction: 1. Navigate to any PDP (simple or variation). 2. Inspect DOM for [role="tab"] elements.
bugs.expected: Tab navigation (Description / Specifications / Reviews) per test case CAT-046; only one tab content visible at a time; active tab has visual indicator.
bugs.actual: 0 elements with role="tab" on any PDP. Simple PDPs render a single 'Properties' card; variation PDPs render 'Options' + 'Description' cards. All card content visible simultaneously. No 'Specifications' or 'Reviews' section headings present.
bugs.evidence: See CAT-010 baseline screenshot 002-CAT-010-pdp-loaded-baseline.png and CAT-012 screenshot 002-CAT-012-variation-selected-price-update.png
bugs.note: May be intentional theme redesign — requires product/design confirmation whether tabs were removed deliberately in 2.47.x, or whether the test case needs to be rewritten for the new card-stack pattern.

bugs.title: Recently Viewed Products section does not appear on PDP after browsing multiple products
bugs.reproduction: 1. In a single session, visit Product A PDP. 2. Visit Product B PDP. 3. Visit Product C PDP. 4. Scroll each PDP fully.
bugs.expected: A 'Recently Viewed' section appears on each PDP after at least one prior product visit, listing previously visited products (excluding the currently viewed product).
bugs.actual: No 'Recently Viewed' section rendered on any of the 4 inspected PDPs. Sections present: PROPERTIES/OPTIONS, PRICE AND DELIVERY, SHIPMENT OPTIONS, CUSTOMERS BOUGHT TOGETHER.
bugs.note: May be feature not enabled in storefront config, or theme pattern has replaced Recently Viewed with 'Customers bought together'. Needs product owner confirmation.

errors: CAT-051/CAT-057: OOS_SKU fixture (QA-OOS-001 / PROD-101) marked as 'Template only — NOT seeded' in test-data/products/test-products.csv. Self-skipped per test case instruction. Action: admin-side seed required before these cases can execute.
CAT-058: LOW_STOCK_SKU fixture (QA-LOW-001 / PROD-102) same situation — template only. Self-skipped.

Application Insights CORS errors observed (dc.services.visualstudio.com/v2/track Cross-Origin Request Blocked) — environmental telemetry noise, not product defect. Not counted as consoleErrors in any test case.
